<!-- Auto-generated by codebase-harness -->

# Pattern Map

## Repository Shape

This repository is a markdown-first engineering log. The durable product is
structured knowledge, not compiled code. The main content boundary is
`log/employer/eneco/`, with on-call work concentrated in
`log/employer/eneco/02_on_call_shift/`.

## Primary Authoring Pattern

On-call incidents use one directory per incident:

```text
log/employer/eneco/02_on_call_shift/{YYYY_MM_DD}_{slug}/
```

Expected incident files are `slack-intake.txt`, `context.md`, `rca.md`, and
`fix.md`. Investigation quality depends on keeping raw intake, context ledger,
root-cause analysis, and fix verification separate.

## Harness Pattern

Centralized harness content lives under `.ai/harness/`. Agent-facing files in
`.claude/`, `.cursor/`, `.gemini/`, and `.codex/` are generated wrappers with
source markers pointing back to `.ai/harness/`.

Task process artifacts live under `.ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}/`, with task IDs
allocated by `.ai/harness/scripts/claim-task-id.sh <slug>`.

## Naming Pattern

Markdown files use kebab-case. Content directories generally use snake_case or
date-prefixed incident directories. Task workspaces use
`{YYYY-MM-DD-NNN}_{slug}` after atomic allocation.
